title: FIGS Growth Strategy and Future Prospects Analysis
text: FIGS signals strategic pivot toward fewer discounts, more brand investment, and rapid expansion into Asia, retail, and institutional sales via TEAMS program. International net revenues increased 20% YoY in Q2 2025 following 30.6% surge for full year 2024. Targets 15% of revenue from international sales in fiscal 2025, expanding into Germany and France with localized digital marketing and regional distribution centers. Entered Japanese market June 2025 with planned South Korea launch in Q3. Deployed regional strategy in Latin America early Q3, opening 12 new markets. Expanded reach from 33 to nearly 60 international markets with upcoming debut in China via Tmall. Over 80% of global healthcare professionals outside U.S. yet international sales represented only 15% of net revenues, indicating substantial growth potential.
